rootCause: The remote smoke live-chat assertion ran in a clean Playwright browser context that had no stored OpenAI credential, so /chat send/receive flowed into the error banner path even though manual production sessions with configured credentials worked.
resolution: Added a smoke-harness live-chat transport switch. Default live mode now stubs OpenAI /v1/responses in Playwright to validate chat UI send/receive without secrets; an explicit opt-in real mode can forward requests and inject auth via REMOTE_SMOKE_CHAT_AUTH/--chat-auth.
